3118600.name: Tile Blocks
3118600.description:
Tile Blocks is a building game where you'll challenge your ingenuity by placing objects from your inventory to help Clampy reach his destination. Each object has a unique functionality, so you'll need to use them wisely to complete the level.

🛠️ Prepare the Scenario

In Creation Mode, you'll use your inventory to place objects. While in this mode, the scenario will remain static. You'll have a wide variety of objects at your disposal: Boxes, bombs, trampolines, levers, and many more. Use them wisely, as you'll only have a limited amount per level.

▶️ Test if it Works

Once you're finished, press Play, and the scenario will come to life. It's time for Clampy to attempt to reach the goal! If it fails, don't worry—you can always make adjustments to the objects and try again.
3118600.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
